3270220.name: Benchmark
3270220.description: This game is a stress-relief title designed specifically for relaxation. As you start, you gradually enter a deep blue, geometric space filled with shapes like triangles and squares, some floating gently while others remain stationary. With a simple left click of the mouse, you can knock down or launch these shapes, watching them scatter or fly away, bringing a sense of ease and pleasure. The minimalist graphics feature a tranquil deep blue background complemented by clean geometric forms, creating an atmosphere that is both mysterious and serene. Accompanied by soothing background music, each click triggers subtle sound effects, enhancing the overall therapeutic experience.
